allocated_storage.description: The amount of storage (in gigabytes) allocated for the database cluster snapshot.

availability_zones.description: The list of availability zones where the database cluster snapshot is available.

db_cluster_snapshot_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the database cluster snapshot.

engine.description: The database engine used for the database cluster.

engine_version.description: The version of the database engine used for the database cluster.

id.description: The unique identifier for the database cluster snapshot.

kms_key_id.description: The AWS KMS key identifier used to encrypt the database cluster snapshot.

license_model.description: The license model information for the database engine.

port.description: The port number on which the database accepts connections.

snapshot_create_time.description: The time when the database cluster snapshot was created.

source_db_cluster_snapshot_arn.description: The ARN of the source database cluster snapshot.

status.description: The current status of the database cluster snapshot.

storage_encrypted.description: Indicates whether the storage for the database cluster snapshot is encrypted.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the database cluster snapshot.

vpc_id.description: The VPC ID associated with the database cluster snapshot.
